themes.name: Agentic AI in research
themes.description: Articles discussing AI agents that can autonomously perform research tasks, interact with systems, and make decisions.

themes.name: AI coding assistants
themes.description: Content focusing on AI tools that help developers write, review, and debug code.

themes.name: AI summarization insights
themes.description: Articles about AI's ability to condense large amounts of text or data into concise summaries and actionable insights.

themes.name: AI research tools
themes.description: Discussions on various AI-powered tools designed to assist in different aspects of research, from literature review to data analysis.

themes.name: AI chatbot research
themes.description: Content specifically exploring the use and implications of AI chatbots in research contexts, including user interaction and data gathering.

themes.name: AI recruitment research
themes.description: Articles that cover how AI is being used in the hiring process, from identifying candidates to analyzing job markets.

themes.name: AI customer insights
themes.description: Content related to using AI to understand customer behavior, preferences, and needs for product and marketing development.

themes.name: AI for design & research
themes.description: Articles on AI applications directly aiding in the design process and user research activities.

themes.name: AI sentiment feedback
themes.description: Discussions on using AI to analyze and understand user emotions, opinions, and feedback from various sources.

themes.name: AI workforce impact
themes.description: Articles exploring how AI is changing job roles, required skills, and the overall labor market.

note: Themes identified by analyzing articles from curated sources, Google News, HackerNews, and DEV.to this month.
